rp_add_cmake_project(NLopt
  GIT_REPOSITORY      https://github.com/stevengj/nlopt.git
  GIT_TAG             v2.6.1
  CMAKE_ARGS
    -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD:STRING=14
    -DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED:BOOL=ON
    -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=/D_HAS_AUTO_PTR_ETC=1
    -DNLOPT_PYTHON:BOOL=OFF
    -DNLOPT_OCTAVE:BOOL=OFF
    -DNLOPT_MATLAB:BOOL=OFF
    -DNLOPT_GUILE:BOOL=OFF
    -DNLOPT_SWIG:BOOL=OFF
    -DNLOPT_TESTS:BOOL=OFF
  PATCH_COMMAND
    ${CMAKE_COMMAND}
      -DNLopt_SOURCE_DIR=<SOURCE_DIR>
      -P ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/NLopt-msvc.patch.cmake
)
